mapper.select: SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS count FROM projects GROUP BY status ORDER BY status
SELECT category, SUM(amount) AS total FROM budget GROUP BY category ORDER BY category

SELECT p.project_id, p.title, p.budget_total, COALESCE(SUM(b.amount), 0) AS budget_used FROM projects p LEFT JOIN budget b ON p.project_id = b.project_id GROUP BY p.project_id, p.title, p.budget_total ORDER BY p.project_id
SELECT TO_CHAR(sent_at, 'YYYY-MM') AS month, COUNT(*) AS count FROM notifications WHERE status = 'SENT' AND sent_at IS NOT NULL GROUP BY TO_CHAR(sent_at, 'YYYY-MM') ORDER BY month DESC LIMIT 12
